summary: Comprehensive testing of Tempo/Beat Engine and Voice Command System features. All 6 backend tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed. Voice command endpoint returns proper JSON structure. Tempo section with 7 presets renders correctly on both full-page mixer and floating panel. Voice command button with wake word toggle and history panel renders on authenticated pages.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified: 1) Voice Command endpoint POST /api/voice/command returns proper JSON with transcript, intent, params, response_text, confidence fields. 2) Tempo & Beat section renders on full-page mixer at /cosmic-mixer with BPM slider (0-200), Tap Tempo button, Stop button, and 7 preset modes (Deep Sleep 40 BPM, Resting Heart 60, Breathing 72, Walking Meditation 80, Active Flow 100, Ecstatic Dance 120, Shamanic Trance 140). 3) Voice Command button (microphone) renders in bottom-left corner of authenticated pages. 4) Wake word toggle button renders below mic button. 5) Voice history panel toggle renders below mic button and opens panel with command suggestions. 6) Floating Cosmic Mixer panel has Tempo channel strip with BPM slider and all 7 preset buttons. 7) Full-page mixer at /cosmic-mixer has all expanded options: 15 frequencies, 11 sounds, 18 mantras, 16 instruments, tempo section. 8) Cosmic Ledger at /cosmic-ledger still accessible with all 4 tabs.

voice_command_endpoint.POST /api/voice/command: PASS - Returns proper JSON structure with transcript, intent, params, response_text, confidence fields
voice_command_endpoint.context_optional: PASS - Accepts request without context parameter (uses default)

cosmic_ledger_endpoint.GET /api/starseed/ledger: PASS - Still accessible and returns correct data

tempo_section.title: PASS - 'Tempo & Beat' section visible with Radio icon
tempo_section.bpm_slider: PASS - BPM slider found with data-testid='tempo-slider-page'
tempo_section.tap_tempo: PASS - Tap Tempo button found with data-testid='tap-tempo-page'
tempo_section.stop_button: PASS - Stop button appears when tempo is active
tempo_section.beat_indicator: PASS - 'All layers breathing to the beat' indicator visible

tempo_presets.deep_sleep: PASS - Deep Sleep (40 BPM) preset found
tempo_presets.resting_heart: PASS - Resting Heart (60 BPM) preset found
tempo_presets.walking_meditation: PASS - Walking Meditation (80 BPM) preset found
tempo_presets.active_flow: PASS - Active Flow (100 BPM) preset found
tempo_presets.ecstatic_dance: PASS - Ecstatic Dance (120 BPM) preset found
tempo_presets.shamanic_trance: PASS - Shamanic Trance (140 BPM) preset found

cosmic_mixer_page.preset_clickable: PASS - Clicking Resting Heart preset activates tempo at 60 BPM

voice_command_ui.mic_button: PASS - Voice Command button (microphone) found with data-testid='voice-command-btn' in bottom-left corner
voice_command_ui.wake_word_toggle: PASS - Wake word toggle button found with data-testid='wake-word-toggle'
voice_command_ui.history_toggle: PASS - Voice history toggle button found with data-testid='voice-history-toggle'
voice_command_ui.history_panel: PASS - Voice history panel opens with data-testid='voice-history-panel'
voice_command_ui.command_suggestions: PASS - Panel shows command suggestions: 'Play ocean', 'Add 528 Hz', 'Set tempo 60', 'Stop all', 'Go to star chart'

floating_mixer_panel.toggle_button: PASS - Floating mixer toggle found with data-testid='mixer-toggle'
floating_mixer_panel.tempo_section: PASS - Tempo section found in floating panel
floating_mixer_panel.bpm_slider: PASS - BPM slider found with data-testid='tempo-slider'
floating_mixer_panel.tempo_presets: PASS - All 7 tempo presets visible in floating panel

cosmic_ledger_page.title: PASS - 'Cosmic Ledger' title visible
cosmic_ledger_page.tabs: PASS - All 4 tabs visible (Overview, Achievements, Legendary Paths, Leaderboard)
